title: Republic Services (RSG) Stock Up 16.4% in a Year: Here's Why
text: Consecutive better-than-expected top and bottom-line performances, and shareholder-friendly moves have been aiding Republic Services??? (RSG) stock.

title: Republic Services: Unclear Strategic Advantage
text: The Waste Management Industry is dominated by primarily two companies, one of which is Republic Services. Republic Services has a significant advantage over smaller players but is also significantly challenged by being the smaller player in the industry's duopoly.
